title: Jana Nayagan Day 1 WW
body:
Jana Nayagan(All languages) Day 1 worldwide collection report :

Tamil nadu : 27 crores

Telugu states : 4 crores

Kerala : 5.6 crores

Karnataka : 11.5 crores

North : 2.6 crores

Overseas : 27.5 crores


Total day 1 worldwide day 1 gross 78.2 crores.


Below par opening for thalapathy vijay. But even after full movie leakage, his stardom managed to get these numbers. First weekend ww numbers will be in range of 150-200 crores.
